import { codeAnchor, codeAnchorId, ref } from "@libar-dev/software-delivery-protocol";

// The label is degradable detail: it drops with a warning while the binding itself — identity
// and target — survives whole.
export const nonStaticLabelAnchor = codeAnchor({
  id: codeAnchorId("impl:orders.non-static-label"),
  label: `computed ${"label"}`,
  satisfies: ref("spec:orders.labelled-target"),
});
